/usr/bin/c++ "CMakeFiles/example-app.dir/main.cpp.o" -o example-app   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/libtorch/lib:/usr/local/lib:/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64 /usr/local/lib/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so /usr/local/lib/libtorch/lib/libc10.so -lsndfile -lfftw3 -lonnxruntime -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/usr/local/lib/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /usr/local/lib/libtorch/lib/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/usr/local/lib/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed
